title: chore(deps): update dependency rollup-plugin-node-resolve to v5
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| rollup-plugin-node-resolve | devDependencies | major | [`4.2.4` -> `5.0.0`](https://diff.intrinsic.com/rollup-plugin-node-resolve/4.2.4/5.0.0) | [source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup-plugin-node-resolve) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rollup/rollup-plugin-node-resolve</summary>

### [`v5.0.0`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup-plugin-node-resolve/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​500-2019-05-15)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup-plugin-node-resolve/compare/v4.2.4...v5.0.0)

-   Replace bublé with babel, update dependencies ([#​216](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup-plugin-node-resolve/pull/216) by [@​mecurc](https://togithub.com/mecurc))
-   Handle module side-effects ([#​219](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup-plugin-node-resolve/pull/219) by [@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

##### Breaking Changes

-   Requires at least rollup@1.11.0 to work (v1.12.0 for module side-effects to be respected)
-   If used with rollup-plugin-commonjs, it should be at least v10.0.0

</details>
